subject: A massively muscular figure with spiked green-tinted hair and golden energy aura, arms outstretched in a power display, wearing a white lower garment with a circular gem at the waist
suspected_ip: Broly (Dragon Ball Z Movie 8, Takao Koyama / Toei version — Legendary Super Saiyan)
description: The image shows a muscular humanoid figure in a full-body power stance, arms spread wide with palms open. The figure has tall, wild, spiked hair with a green-gold tint consistent with the Legendary Super Saiyan transformation. The body radiates a golden-green energy aura visible at the edges of the figure. The figure wears what appears to be a white or cream lower garment (sash or belt region) with a circular blue gem visible at the waist. The face is visible but rendered simply at this resolution — expression reads as wild or raging. The background is dark with energy glow effects. This card is from the Galactic Battle set (BT1-073), which draws from the classic Dragon Ball Z film roster, and the visual design aligns with the Takao Koyama / Toei-animated Broly rather than the Akira Toriyama-authored DBS Broly redesign. Note: image quality is low (260x363); fine details are not reliable.
foreground: massively muscular figure with green-spiked saiyan hair, arms spread, golden energy aura
background: dark background with glowing energy effects
emotion: raging, wild — arms spread in a dominance/power display, untamed expression
